hero.headline: Your Business Is Losing Customers Right Now.
hero.headlineTh: ธุรกิจของคุณกำลังสูญเสียลูกค้า ทุกนาทีนี้
hero.sub: While you read this, your competitors are being found on Google. You're not.

pain.headline: What Is Invisibility Costing You?
pain.headlineTh: ความไม่มีตัวตนออนไลน์ทำให้คุณสูญเสียเท่าไร?
pain.sub: Every day without a digital presence is revenue walking out the door.
pain.card1Text: 73% of Thai customers Google a business before visiting. If you're not online, you don't exist.
pain.card2Text: Page 2 on Google gets less than 1% of clicks. You're paying rent while competitors get all the traffic.
pain.card3Text: Businesses that advertise online grow 3x faster. Word-of-mouth has limits. Digital marketing has none.
pain.card4Text: The average SME owner loses 3-4 hours daily on manual tasks. Time is your scarcest resource.

services.headline: Everything You Need to Dominate Your Market
services.headlineTh: ทุกอย่างที่คุณต้องการเพื่อครองตลาด
services.sub: Six integrated service pillars — built to work together for maximum impact.
services.s1Desc: Stunning websites, local SEO, Google Business optimization & brand identity that makes you unforgettable.
services.s2Desc: Google, Meta & TikTok ads, social media management & content that converts scrollers into customers.
services.s3Desc: Streamline your workflows, automate follow-ups, CRM setup & eliminate hours of repetitive daily tasks.
services.s4Desc: AI chatbots, intelligent assistants & automation that serve your customers 24/7 without human labor.
services.s5Desc: Real-time dashboards, conversion tracking & competitive intelligence to make data-driven decisions.
services.s6Desc: Digital transformation strategy, market positioning & implementation roadmap tailored to your goals.

howItWorks.headline: From Day One to Transformation
howItWorks.sub: A proven three-step process that gets you results — fast.
howItWorks.step1Desc: We audit your digital presence and competitors in 48 hours. You get a clear picture of your opportunity.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We design, develop and launch your complete solution fast. No delays, no excuses — only results.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We manage, optimize and scale your results every month. Your success is our ongoing mission.

stats.headline: Results That Speak for Themselves
stats.sub: Numbers don't lie. Neither do our clients.
stats.diff1Desc: We integrate cutting-edge AI into every solution we build — giving you an unfair advantage.
stats.diff2Desc: We don't sell deliverables. We sell outcomes. If you don't grow, we haven't done our job.
stats.diff3Desc: One partner for everything digital. No juggling agencies, freelancers or half-solutions.

contact.headline: Ready to Grow?
contact.sub: Tell us about your business. We'll show you the opportunity.

footer.tagline: MORE CUSTOMERS. MORE SALES. MORE GROWTH.
